arts.ttl: Wolves vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The Reds, meanwhile, continued to enjoy their positive start under new manager Arne Slot by thrashing West Ham United 5-1 in the Carabao Cup. With Luis Diaz, Mohamed Salah, Diogo Jota and Cody Gakpo all among the goals recently, Saturday presents a monstrous challenge for Wolves and O'Neil. Liverpool will aim to keep pressure on Premier League leaders Manchester City when they visit Wolves in Saturday's evening kick-off.

arts.sum: Liverpool look to continue their momentum when the Reds face Wolves in the Premier League this weekend.
